query: Within the time range of March 24, 2021, from 12:30 to 13:00, a single failure occurred. answer: {"root cause occurrence datetime": "2021-03-23 21:08:00", "root cause component": "Redis01", "root cause reason": "Redis01 shows critical memory exhaustion symptoms starting at 2021-03-23 21:08:00. The maxmemory metric is pinned at 4294967296 bytes (4GB hard limit), while rdb_changes_since_last_save stands at 1.51B unsaved operations\u2014nearly 5x higher than Redis02's 1.36B. This indicates Redis01 has hit its eviction policy threshold and cannot accept new writes efficiently. The metric timestamp of 21:08:00 aligns with the earliest filesystem pressure on apache01 (FSAvailableSpace metrics all dated 21:08:00), and precedes the Tomcat request processing time spike (1.8B+ ms on Tomcat01/02) and GC pressure observed from ~21:06 onwards across all Tomcat instances.
